ham.subject: Your Weekly Newsletter – Special Offers Inside
ham.body:
Hi there,

It's that time again – our weekly newsletter is here with the latest deals, top picks, and exclusive offers. Check out our new arrivals, enjoy 20% off on selected items, and get free shipping on orders over INR 2000. Stay tuned for more exciting updates.

Happy shopping!

Best,
ABC Retail Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Pay Your Missed Delivery Fee Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx package was not delivered due to a missing address. To avoid additional charges, please pay the missed delivery fee of INR 850 within 24 hours. Click <URL> to proceed. Failure to pay will result in cancellation.

Thank you,
FedEx Customer Support
